summary: Complete testing of redesigned /prenota landing page - All features working correctly. Dark theme, artwork hero, collapsible services, 3-step booking form, galleries, contact section with Google Maps link, WhatsApp button, and mobile responsive layout all verified.

landing_page_tests: ✓ Page loads at /prenota with dark theme (#0a0a0a background)
✓ BRUNO MELITO HAIR branding visible in navbar
✓ PRENOTA ORA button in navbar opens booking form
✓ 40+ Years Experience badge visible on desktop
✓ Address displayed: Via Vito Nicola Melorio 101, S.M.C.V.
services_section_tests: ✓ Taglio & Piega category visible with prices
booking_form_tests: ✓ Step 1 - 'Scegli i Servizi' with 17 services from API
✓ Step 2 - 'Data e Ora' with date picker and time selector
✓ Step 3 - 'I Tuoi Dati' with name, phone, notes fields
gallery_tests: ✓ 'Dove Nasce la Bellezza' salon gallery with 4 photos
✓ 'I Nostri Lavori' hairstyle gallery with 6 photos
✓ Tags on gallery images (Capelli Lunghi, Capelli Corti, Colorazione, Balayage, Piega)
contact_section_tests: ✓ Address clickable and links to Google Maps
mobile_responsive_tests: ✓ Fixed bottom PRENOTA ORA button visible on mobile (390x844)
✓ Hero artwork centered on mobile viewport
✓ Navbar responsive with PRENOTA ORA button

seed_data_creation: None - using existing services and operators
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redesigned /prenota landing page fully tested. Key features: Dark theme (#0a0a0a), centered artwork hero image, collapsible services list (Mostra/Nascondi listino), 3-step booking form (services → date/time → personal info), two gallery sections (salon interior 4 photos, hairstyles 6 photos), contact section with clickable Google Maps address, WhatsApp button, business hours 08:00-19:00. Mobile has fixed bottom PRENOTA ORA button. Backend APIs: /api/public/services (17 services), /api/public/operators (1 operator). All data-testid attributes present for testing.

dark_theme.accents: Amber/gold text for headings and highlights
